name: Wine-Sauced Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 pound boneless skinless chicken breast halves
recipeInstructions:
Advance preparation time: 30 minutes
Final preparation time: 10 to 60 minutes
1. Cook noodles according to the package directions, using 4 cups of hot water in a large pan. Drain and rinse with cold water, then drain again.
2. Slice chicken into 3/4-inch strips. Spray a cold, large non-stick skillet with cooking spray and add the chicken. Cook over medium-high heat until tender and no longer pink (about 4 minutes), turning pieces occasionally.
3. Drain mushrooms. Cut up tomatoes, saving the juice. In a saucepan, combine tomatoes and juice, drained mushrooms, tomato sauce, wine, cornstarch, bouillon granules, garlic, and basil. Cook and stir over medium-high heat until thickened and bubbly (about 2 minutes). Remove from heat.
4. Stir in chicken and onions.
5. Spoon pasta to one side of four individual shallow baking dishes. Spoon tomato-chicken mixture on the other side. Cover with clear plastic wrap, then foil. Seal, label, and freeze.
Use microwave-safe dishes if casseroles will be reheated in the microwave.
RE-HEATING:
Conventional oven: Remove plastic wrap. Cover with foil. Bake frozen casserole, covered, at 375°F for 1 hour or until heated through.
Microwave oven: Remove foil. Cover with vented plastic wrap or wax paper. Cook on 70% power (medium-high) for 9 minutes (1 serving) or 16-18 minutes (2 servings) or until heated through, turning dishes once.
Per serving:
276 Kcal 4g fat (0.8g sat fat) 11% CFF 749mg Na (31.7g PRO/3.3g FAT/26.7g CHO)
